objective.definition: Reduce assembly effort while preserving access for board replacement, panel removal, cable routing, and visible inspection.
objective.failure_rule: Part count reduction fails if board access, datum alignment, or removable service covers are blocked.

constraint: rail datum ribs remain visible and measurable

trade_off.gain: reduces alignment operations and corner fasteners
trade_off.guardrail: rail datum ribs remain visible and measurable
trade_off.cost_if_violated: Part count reduction fails if board access, datum alignment, or removable service covers are blocked.

decision.rationale: integrate rails into a single frame spine

verification.check: rail datum ribs remain visible and measurable

evolution.leaves_for_next: rail datum ribs remain visible and measurable | mit: Keep two removable service panels and a straight slide-out board path.

objective.definition: Reduce assembly effort while preserving access for board replacement, panel removal, cable routing, and visible inspection.
objective.failure_rule: Part count reduction fails if board access, datum alignment, or removable service covers are blocked.

constraint: boards must slide out after removing one service panel

trade_off.gain: removes loose spacers and improves board stack repeatability
trade_off.guardrail: boards must slide out after removing one service panel
trade_off.cost_if_violated: Part count reduction fails if board access, datum alignment, or removable service covers are blocked.

decision.rationale: integrate board standoffs into an internal ladder

verification.check: boards must slide out after removing one service panel

evolution.leaves_for_next: boards must slide out after removing one service panel | mit: Print with rail datum ribs along Z, add inspection windows, and prototype shorter calibration coupon first.

objective.definition: Reduce assembly effort while preserving access for board replacement, panel removal, cable routing, and visible inspection.
objective.failure_rule: Part count reduction fails if board access, datum alignment, or removable service covers are blocked.

trade_off.gain: protects main frame from fragile external part failure
trade_off.cost_if_violated: Part count reduction fails if board access, datum alignment, or removable service covers are blocked.

evolution.leaves_for_next: hinge dummies attach from outside | mit: Use 0.25 mm clearance and deburr grooves after printing.

objective.definition: Reduce assembly effort while preserving access for board replacement, panel removal, cable routing, and visible inspection.
objective.failure_rule: Part count reduction fails if board access, datum alignment, or removable service covers are blocked.

constraint: minimum three service access points remain

trade_off.guardrail: minimum three service access points remain
trade_off.cost_if_violated: Part count reduction fails if board access, datum alignment, or removable service covers are blocked.

decision.rationale: reduce six panels to two service panels plus fixed frame faces

verification.check: minimum three service access points remain

evolution.leaves_for_next: minimum three service access points remain | mit: Keep them separate and externally replaceable.
